pageContext.name: Glimmery Kandel
pageContext.description: The light is hopeIt exists where all life existsSometimes it burns, sometimes it shinesIt contains this warmth and tendernessI am Glimmery KandelI have many stories to tell youYou just need to pat me and I'll light up your heart  With long battery life, the warm, atmospheric Glimmery Kandel will spend every night with you! Designed by Xiachong as an ethereal collaboration between Infinity Studio's sub-brand The Lab and Way, this enchanting collectible lamp will guide you into dreamland!
